words: The following tape was recorded on the third of Duly, 1973 on the porch
of the home of Mr. and Mrs, Marvin Long. The voices on the tape are those
of Marvin Long, his wife Martha, and Rob Moore, the interviewer. The Longs
live in the residental section of Kendrick, Idaho, in the house built by the
orginal draftsman of the town plat for Kendrick, a man named Kirby. The
backaround noise is the traffic on the street outside the Long home.
MARTHA LONG: ...and he had a number of what we call his youthful business ven
tures that are real interesting, considering his age.
MARVIN LONG: Well, I don't...
MRS. LONG: Now your junk business, you know that is. Is that on now?
ROB MOORE: I think so.
